## What

[One paragraph describing the change]

## Skill(s) Affected

- [ ] New skill: `skill-name`
- [ ] Modified skill: `skill-name`
- [ ] Repo infrastructure (README, CI, templates)

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has proper frontmatter (`name`, `description` with trigger keywords)
- [ ] `name` in frontmatter matches directory name
- [ ] Description includes auto-trigger keywords
- [ ] `SKILL.md` body is under 500 lines
- [ ] Detailed content is in `references/` directory
- [ ] All content is in English
- [ ] Tested locally with `npx skills add /path/to/local/repo`
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)
